title: SimpleShop
description: This plugin adds a simple, customizable shop into the game, with selling features and subcategories.
body:
# SimpleShop #
**The simple, clean GUI shop solution for Minecraft servers**

**Version: v1.0.0 | API: 1.21+ | Dependencies: Vault | Optional: PlaceholderAPI, EssentialsX**
 

### Quick Start ###


1. Drop SimpleShop.jar into /plugins/
2. Install Vault + an economy plugin (EssentialsX, CMI, etc.)
3. Restart server
4. Use /shop to open the shop
5. Edit shop.yml to configure categories and items or use /shop admin to enable editing and use Shift + Right Click on the category or item you want to edit. 

### Commands ###

/shop - Open the main shop GUI - simpleshop.use
/shop help - View player help - simpleshop.help
/shop sell - Open the sell GUI - simpleshop.sell
/shop reload - Reload configuration - simpleshop.admin.reload
/sellgui - Direct sell GUI access - simpleshop.sell

Aliases: /store, /buy, /sell, /sellmenu

### Permissions ### 

**Player Permissions** (Default: true)
simpleshop.use - Access the shop
simpleshop.sell - Sell items
simpleshop.help - View help

**Admin Permissions (Default: op)**
simpleshop.admin.reload - Reload configuration

**Category Permissions (Default: false)**
simpleshop.category.<name> - Access specific category

**Wildcards**
simpleshop.admin.* - All admin permissions

# Features: #

### Category-Based Organization ### 

Create unlimited shop categories. Custom category names with color code support. Custom icons for each category. Permission-locked categories for VIP shops. Clean grid layout for easy browsing.

### Buy & Sell System ### 

Configure separate buy and sell prices per item. Disable buying or selling individually per item. Support for all vanilla Minecraft items. Price display in item lore. Balance checking before transactions.

### GUI System ###

Main menu displaying all categories. Category pages with pagination support. Quantity selector with quick buttons (-64, -16, -1, +1, +16, +64). Purchase confirmation dialog for large transactions. Dedicated sell GUI for quick item selling. Clean, lag-free inventory interface.

### Sell GUI ###

Drag items into the sell interface. See total value before confirming. Sell multiple item types at once. One-click sell all functionality.

### Economy Integration ### 

Full Vault support. Compatible with all major economy plugins including EssentialsX Economy, CMI Economy, PlayerPoints, and many more.

## File Structure ##

plugins/SimpleShop/
config.yml - Main configuration
messages.yml - All plugin messages
shop.yml - Categories & items

### Config Highlights ###

config.yml:
GUI titles and appearance. Filler/border materials. Sound effects (open, click, purchase, error). Confirmation thresholds. Sell GUI toggle. Cooldown settings.

messages.yml:
Fully customizable messages. Color code support. Placeholder support.

shop.yml:
Category definitions. Category icons and names. Item prices (buy/sell). Custom item names and lore. Category permissions.

### Support ###
Requires Vault + economy plugin. Tested on Paper/Spigot 1.21+.
- Report issues with this link: [Issues](https://forms.gle/Fxe9wQ6GzMTNqHtB8)
- Suggest new features or get support with this link: [Suggest Features](https://forms.gle/Fxe9wQ6GzMTNqHtB8)

## Premium ##
![Comparison Between Free and Premium ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5741f8a6e95ef5a41ee41d10620dad0b1f388223.png)

Upgrade to [SimpleShop Premium](https://buymeacoffee.com/waffleboiiiiii/extras) for advanced features including:
Rotating/Daily Shops with stock limits,
Command Items (sell ranks, kits, crates),
Buy/Sell Limits with reset timers,
In-Game Admin Editor (no config editing!),
Custom Item Support (ItemsAdder, Oraxen, MMOItems),
Search System across all categories,
Subcategories for better organization,
Transaction Logging for auditing,
And many more!

_If everything looks a little odd, due to markdown formatting_



Thanks for the support!

**_Developed by waffleboiiiiii_**
